[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 2/7 (Mon), Lesson & Scrimmages rewards will be tripled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to develop your students and exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 2/7 (Mon) 19:00 – 2/14 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)

#BlueArchive

*Sensei, we're sorry for the confusion.
It ends at 2/13 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
